title: Pending Queue Row
description: A single row appended to trips/{slug}/pending.json. App writes, Cowork drains.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned to '1' for Phase 1 contract lock.

id.description: Stable identifier. Drain MUST be idempotent on this id.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the App wrote the row.

tripSlug.description: Active trip slug; matches trips/{slug}/ folder.

kind.description: Source-type of the capture. Drain routes on this field.

source.description: Origin surface. 'app' in normal flow; 'test' for fixtures.

status.description: Row lifecycle state. App only writes 'pending'. Cowork flips to 'drained' or 'stuck'.

memoryWorthy.description: User flag marking a row for memoir consideration.

imagePath.description: Relative path to a receipt image (receipt kind only), e.g. trips/{slug}/receipts/{id}.jpg.

visionUsed.description: True when macOS Vision produced the first-pass OCR. Logged by extract-receipt.

payload.description: Kind-specific body. Loose by design — contract tightens in later phases per kind.

dedupKey.description: Optional stable hash used by drain to skip duplicates.

notes.description: Freeform note attached to the capture.
